title: ludwigia adscendens subsp. diffusa
intro: Ludwigia adscendens subsp. diffusa, also known as water wisteria or Chinese water wisteria, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Onagraceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ludwigia adscendens subsp. diffusa include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections, such as respiratory and urinary tract infections. Ludwigia adscendens subsp. diffusa can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried herb, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
